channel.title: Comments on: Deschutes Brewery: Mirror Pond Pale Ale – Ep. 130
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Jen
item.dc:creator: Jen
item.description: Like Paul, I too am a "malt person" (as opposed to a "hop head," I guess), so this sounds like an IPA I need to add to my to-drink list. Looking at their distribution map on the Deschutes web site, looks like it will have to wait til my next trip to the west coast, unfortunately...
item.content:encoded: Like Paul, I too am a “malt person” (as opposed to a “hop head,” I guess), so this sounds like an IPA I need to add to my to-drink list. Looking at their distribution map on the Deschutes web site, looks like it will have to wait til my next trip to the west coast, unfortunately…

item.title: By: Scooter Hendon
item.dc:creator: Scooter Hendon
item.description: One of my favorite beers. Always a go-to.
item.content:encoded: One of my favorite beers. Always a go-to.

item.title: By: Frank Russo
item.dc:creator: Frank Russo
item.description:
Thanks Guys. Love every episode.
Savannah Brewers League
item.content:encoded:
Thanks Guys. Love every episode.

Savannah Brewers League
